creator: kevin@bostoncrypto.com
text:
Attempting to build gnupg-2.0.19_3 fails for me, whereas 2.0.19_2 built successfully.  Tail of output from 'make' follows:

mv -f .deps/gpg2keys_hkp-no-libgcrypt.Tpo .deps/gpg2keys_hkp-no-libgcrypt.Po
cc -I/usr/local/include -I/usr/local/include -O2 -pipe -fno-strict-aliasing -Wall -Wno-pointer-sign -Wpointer-arith  -L/usr/local/lib -o gpg2keys_hkp gpg2keys_hkp-gpgkeys_hkp.o gpg2keys_hkp-ksutil.o gpg2keys_hkp-no-libgcrypt.o  ../gl/libgnu.a  ../common/libcommon.a ../jnlib/libjnlib.a -L/usr/local/lib -lgpg-error   /usr/local/lib/libiconv.so -Wl,-rpath -Wl,/usr/local/lib /usr/local/lib/libintl.so /usr/local/lib/libiconv.so -Wl,-rpath -Wl,/usr/local/lib  -L/usr/local/lib -lcurl
gpg2keys_hkp-gpgkeys_hkp.o: In function `send_key':
gpgkeys_hkp.c:(.text+0x3d2): undefined reference to `xfree'
gpgkeys_hkp.c:(.text+0x5f0): undefined reference to `xfree'
gpgkeys_hkp.c:(.text+0x690): undefined reference to `xfree'
gpg2keys_hkp-gpgkeys_hkp.o: In function `main':
gpgkeys_hkp.c:(.text+0xebd): undefined reference to `xfree'
gpgkeys_hkp.c:(.text+0x1754): undefined reference to `xfree'
gpg2keys_hkp-gpgkeys_hkp.o:gpgkeys_hkp.c:(.text+0x194e): more undefined references to `xfree' follow
gmake[2]: *** [gpg2keys_hkp] Error 1
gmake[2]: Leaving directory `/usr/ports/security/gnupg/work/gnupg-2.0.19/keyserver'
gmake[1]: *** [all-recursive] Error 1
gmake[1]: Leaving directory `/usr/ports/security/gnupg/work/gnupg-2.0.19'
gmake: *** [all] Error 2
*** [do-build] Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/security/gnupg.
*** [build] Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/security/gnupg.

How-To-Repeat: cd /usr/ports/security/gnupg
make
